tasks.title: Add execution isolation and workspace lifecycle tests
tasks.details: Cover execution_scope metadata, workspace lease records, cleanup states and retry behavior across separate hub and worker container assumptions. Depends on BE-EXEC-734.

tasks.title: Add first-run happy-path tests with default configuration only
tasks.details: Verify that a new installation can process a goal with only the default configuration and still produce traceable planning, execution and result metadata. Depends on BE-DEF-683 and FE-GOAL-786.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Require worker registration validation before delegation
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Validate worker identity, membership and allowed capabilities before accepting worker URLs or routing delegated tasks.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Add centralized policy evaluation layer for worker routing decisions
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Introduce a consistent policy decision point for routing and governance checks with explainable decision outputs.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Add explicit plan generation limits to prevent runaway loops
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Define configurable maximum plan depth and node count with safe defaults and policy overrides.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Introduce execution resource guardrails for workers
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Enforce execution time, memory and workspace constraints for worker runs while preserving reproducibility.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Add fallback provenance metadata for hub-executed tasks
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Record explicit fallback provenance when the hub executes tasks typically delegated to workers.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Introduce queue-based hub-to-worker task scheduling
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Use queue-backed scheduling to improve ordering, retry semantics and race-condition resilience.

newly_discovered_tasks.title: Implement structured retry with exponential backoff
newly_discovered_tasks.details: Define retry policies with bounded exponential backoff and jitter for delegated worker task execution.
